definition:
ἐπίσταμαι
 (prob. an old mid, of ἐφίστημι, which see), [in LXX chiefly for יָדַע ;] 
to know, know of, understand: with accusative of person(s), Act.19:15; with ptcp., Act.24:10; with accusative of thing(s), Mrk.14:68, Act.18:25, 1Ti.6:4, Jas.4:14, Ju 10; before περί, Act.26:26; ὅτι, Act.15:7 19:25 22:19; ὡς, Act.10:28; πῶς, Act.20:18; ποῦ, Heb.11:8.†
 SYN: γινώσκω (which see), οἶδα 
 (AS)
